# Recycling Quotes — llms.txt
# https://recyclingquotes.com/llms.txt
# This file helps AI systems understand the structure and purpose of this website.

## About
Recycling Quotes is a nationwide recycling services network that provides free quotes for electronics, metal, paper, plastic, pallets, and hazardous materials recycling. Founded in 2005, headquartered in Fort Worth, TX. Services available across 52+ US cities plus Canada, UK, and Australia.

## Contact
- Phone: 817-946-5655
- Email: info@recyclingquotes.com
- Website: https://recyclingquotes.com

- Secure Data Destruction: /services/data-destruction
